name: session-review
description: Wiki snapshot and git review-branch protocol for worker/reviewer session review loops.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate worker/reviewer review loops through wiki snapshots and git branches.
interface.longDescription: Runs an internal session-review protocol where a worker and reviewer converge code or document work using a wiki snapshot handshake, a review branch, parseable status blocks, lock enforcement, and an explicit user-confirmed completion gate.
defaultPrompt: Use $request-review to start a review loop.
Use $review to inspect the requested review branch.
Use $complete after reviewer approval and user confirmation.
